hero.subtitle: IDLe Metric automatically detects RED and GREEN dock signals through your phone camera — so you can rest in the cab and get alerted the moment it's time to go.

features_title: Everything You Need at the Dock

features.title: Auto Signal Detection
features.desc: Camera watches the dock light through your side mirror. Detects RED and GREEN automatically — no tapping, no manual input.

features.title: Session Timer
features.desc: Tracks total wait time with RED and GREEN breakdown. Full session history with average, total, and max wait times.

features.title: Instant Audio Alert
features.desc: The moment the signal turns GREEN, you get an audio alert — even if the screen is dimmed and you're resting.

features.title: Adjustable Detection Zone
features.desc: Drag the blue frame to cover exactly the signal light. Calibrate tracking so the app follows the light if the mirror shifts.

features.title: All Lighting Conditions
features.desc: Auto-exposure adjustment handles bright sun, overcast, night, and low warehouse lighting without manual tweaking.

features.title: Battery Saver
features.desc: Screen dims to 0.5% brightness during long waits. Camera sleep mode after first signal detected.

features.title: Manual Mode
features.desc: No signal light at this dock? Use the manual timer. Runs in background with a persistent notification.

features.title: Detention Calculator
features.desc: Set your free period and hourly rate. The app calculates detention time and cost automatically.

features.title: Export to CSV
features.desc: Export your session history as a CSV file for reporting, invoicing, or personal records.

how_steps.title: Mount Your Phone
how_steps.desc: Place your phone near the side mirror so the camera can see the dock signal light through the mirror reflection.

how_steps.title: Aim the Detection Zone
how_steps.desc: Drag the blue frame to cover the signal light. Tap Calibrate to lock tracking — the app follows the light automatically.

how_steps.title: Rest and Wait
how_steps.desc: The screen dims to save battery. The app watches continuously. When the signal turns GREEN — your alert fires.

download_subtitle: Tested in bright sun, overcast mornings, night, and low warehouse lighting. Works offline. No account required.

footer.tagline: Built for truck drivers. Works offline. No data collected.
